titleStmt.title: SII 42.302: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 302. (A.R. No. 70 of 1956-57.) Donakoṇḍa, Darsi Taluk, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the temple of Gangamma.
Dated Śaka 1447, Pārthiva, Pushya śu. 15, Friday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1525, December 29.

Registers the grant of Donakoṇḍa by the king to the goddess Gaṅgāparamēśvarī of the village on the representation of the dvārapālakas Timmapa-nāyuḍu, Āḍapa-nāyuḍu, Bhaṇḍāramu Bokkisam Bairi-nēḍu, Avasaram Basivi-nēḍu etc. (NDI Part I, p. 315).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1447 Agunēṁṭi pā
¨rthiva saṁvvatsara puṣya śu 15 śu sōmagrahaṇa
puṇyakālamaṁdu haṁppe virūpā
kṣaviṭhalēśvaradēvarla saṁnidhini śrī donakoṁ
ḍa gaṁgā paramēśvari parigrahamu . śrīma
nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mū
rurāyaragaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḷa Aṣṭadi
kkurāya manōbhayaṁkkara bhāsadappuvarā
yaragaṁḍa pūrvadakṣiṇa paścima samudrā
dhīśvara yavanarājya sthāpanācā¨ryya Aśva
pati gajapati vibhāḷa śrī vīrapratāpa śrī kṛ
ṣṇarāyamahārāyalu vidyānagara
maṁdu siṁhvāsanaṁbuna bṛthvīrājyaṁsē
yucuṁḍaṁgānu . śrī kṛṣṇarāyamahā
rāyala dvārapālakulaina gōpakulava¨rddhanu
luṁnnu ye(ya)dukulasrē(śrē)ṣṭhuluṁnnu ya(E)lagōla
siṁhyā(hvu)luṁnaina tiṁmapanāyaṁḍu A
ḍapanāye(yaṁ)ḍu narasapanāye(yaṁ)ḍu bhaṁḍāra
mu peddapanāyaṁḍu bokki(kka)saṁ bairinēṁḍu
nāgatāta Avasaraṁ basivinēṁḍu kētayyaṁ
gāru modalaina rāyasiṁhyāsanānaṁ
gala gōtraṁvārini yeddumummaya bu
gāḍiṁgāru ḍagani naṁdagōpālaka praśasti
ḍivi baḍugulavāriki mūlasthānamaina
donakoṁḍa gaṁgāparamēśvariṁ goniyāḍi
vigōtraṁvāru saṁttōṣiṁcci kriṣṇarāyama
hārāyalaku viṁna(nna)pamusēsi gaṁgā para

mēśvariki Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavāla
kuṁnnu Amṛtapaḷlakuṁnnu celli
ṁcunaṭṭugānu donakoṁḍḍa grā
mamu vāpīkūpataṭāka nidhi
nikṣēpādi sahī(hi)tamugānu ce(ca)tu
śśī(ssī)mānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāI(yi)gānu
sama¨rppiṁcina [grāmadha¨rma] śāsanamu [.]
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ta vasuṁdharāṁ(m) . ṣaṣṭi¨rva¨rṣa saha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ [.]
śatruṇāpi kru(kṛ)tō dha¨rmmaḥ pālanī
yyō(yō) prayatnataḥ .
śyā(syā)ddha¨rmma śa kaścapi [.]
chappannadēśāla kolaṁ mā
ṁkānakuṁ pādaśā(sē)vakuṁḍu
yadumuṁmayaba gōviṁgā
ru . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
jēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 42.302 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
